name: Smoke tests
description: Minimal end-to-end checks that exercise every part of the MAVERIK pipeline: a tool-using question with a deterministic criterion, and an LLM-judged question.

questions.text: Use the Microsoft docs to check: what base class do you inherit from in .NET to implement a long-running hosted background task? Answer with just the class name.
According to the Microsoft docs, which interface does a .NET hosted service implement? Answer with just the interface name.
In one or two sentences, what is an ASP.NET Core minimal API?

criterion.rubric: PASS if the answer describes defining HTTP endpoints/APIs with minimal code and without controllers. FAIL otherwise.
